ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector for easier referencing and data integration */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, forestry and fishing) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sector was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sector's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsectors" (
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the subsector belongs to */,
  "subsector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each subsector for easier referencing and data integration */,
  "subsector_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsector (e.g., Crops, Livestock) */,
  "subsector_type" TEXT /* Type of the subsector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subsector was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the subsector's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., 2011-12, 2012-13) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the year's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsector the data belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Economic value for the subsector and year */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_subsector_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsector_id") REFERENCES subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, policymaker, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the indicator was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the indicator's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
